target_skill.name: git-ops
target_skill.description: GitHub interface — "push this", "commit this", "create a repo", "push fix to live site", "what's in fairbay/X". Not for new-host setup (→ ship-it) or prototyping (→ build).

competing_skills.name: ship-it
competing_skills.description: Set up deployment — "ship it", "deploy this", "host this", "App Store", "Claude Code handoff". Not for fixes to live sites (→ git-ops), prototyping (→ build), or planning (→ architect).

competing_skills.name: build
competing_skills.description: Write working code — "build this", "prototype this", "MVP this", "make it real". Not for planning (→ architect), bugs (→ systematic-debug), or deploy (→ ship-it).

competing_skills.name: architect
competing_skills.description: Plan before coding — "architect this", "tech spec", "PRD", "how would I build this". Produces SPEC.md/PLAN.md. Not for raw ideas (→ idea-scout), code (→ build), or deploy (→ ship-it).

competing_skills.name: grove
competing_skills.description: Capture, browse, update Grove tasks/ideas — "grove this", "what's in grove", "save this idea", "recent activity". Not for iOS reminders (→ add-to-do) or scoring (→ idea-scout, idea-vault).

positive_cases: Push the prefill fix to fairbay/listing-lens live site
Commit this and push to main with a clear message
What's in fairbay/grove-mobile? List the recent commits
Create a new fairbay/photo-diff repo for the new tool
negative_cases: Set up Vercel hosting for the new app — first deploy ever (expect ship-it)
Build me a React dashboard for vault stats with weekly rollups (expect build)
Architect the data model for grove v2 — write the SPEC.md (expect architect)
What's in grove this morning — any new tasks? (expect grove)
App Store submission setup for grove-mobile, fresh listing (expect ship-it)
